summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Hydrated open PRs were classified independently with no shared canonical, no closure, no merge, and no fix artifact, except #80590 and #67820 were routed to central security handling because deterministic validation marked them security-sensitive. Seven refs could not be classified because live state was unavailable in the preflight artifact after GitHub API rate limiting.

actions.reason: Broad maintainer-owned feature PR should remain on its own review path; plan mode and blocked merge/fix actions allow only non-mutating classification.
CI policy PR is a distinct review item and requires normal maintainer proof/review rather than inventory cleanup.
Distinct open PR with useful code and tests; keep independent pending author/maintainer review.
Small focused fix remains an independent maintainer-review PR; no merge action is allowed by the job.
Distinct message-delivery fix should stay on its own proof and maintainer review path.
Security-sensitive sandbox/exec-adjacent PR is out of scope for ProjectClownfish inventory cleanup and must be routed to central security handling.
Focused replacement-style PR with contributor credit should remain independent for maintainer review; merge is blocked by job policy and missing preflight.
Useful draft maintainer PR should stay open as an independent review item.
Focused draft PR with tests remains an independent maintainer review item.
Stacked memory refactor is independent and needs its own proof/review path; no canonical should be invented.
Focused draft PR remains independent pending author follow-up.
Distinct session-state fix should remain independent for maintainer review.
Draft gateway fix is an independent PR requiring proof; keep open.
Security-sensitive auth-provider/QR handling PR is out of scope for ProjectClownfish inventory cleanup and must be routed to central security handling.
Test-only regression coverage for active failures is independent and should not be closed as inventory cleanup.
Useful contributor PR should preserve credit and remain independent; merge is not allowed and missing merge preflight blocks any merge recommendation.
Small draft cleanup remains an independent PR; low-signal closeout is disabled by the job frontmatter.
Provider schema projection PR remains independent pending author follow-up and CI/mergeability.
